## Summary

Describe the behavior, docs, or maintenance change.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e:run` if browser shell behavior changed
- [ ] Docs updated when setup, architecture, safety, or user-visible behavior changed

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, raw terminal output, raw process logs, environment variables, private prompts, or file-write contents were added
- [ ] Filesystem, shell, Tauri permission, persistence, or diagnostics changes received extra review

## Notes

Call out migration steps, known limitations, or follow-up work.
